title: 21 Hermes concepts to get you started
summary: Jack Roberts presents 21 foundational concepts related to Hermes, a model or framework. The video serves as an introductory guide for learners new to the system.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through 21 foundational concepts for Hermes, a model or framework, in an introductory format aimed at learners new to the system.
